problem_text: As part of our ongoing project to develop more sustainable chemical processes, we need to understand the mechanism behind the selective oxidation of a secondary alcohol to a ketone using an environmentally friendly oxidizing agent. Design a detailed reaction mechanism for this transformation. Your report should include a step-by-step breakdown of the mechanism, highlighting any intermediates and transition states. Also, evaluate the potential environmental impact of the oxidizing agent used. Note that the specific secondary alcohol and oxidizing agent have not been provided, so you will need to select appropriate examples to illustrate your mechanism. Additionally, consider any potential side reactions that could occur and how they might be minimized.
internal_gaps: Specific secondary alcohol is not provided
Environmental impact assessment lacks criteria for evaluation
